perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a white lace-sleeved top holds a red mesh bag of sweet potatoes in a Costco warehouse, speaking enthusiastically to the camera. (2) She points to a price tag showing $175 for 2.8kg of sweet potatoes. (3) The scene transitions to a home kitchen where the sweet potatoes are washed in a sink, then wrapped individually in aluminum foil and placed on a baking tray. (4) The tray is inserted into a white SMEG brand oven. (5) Close-ups of the oven dials show settings for 190 degrees and 60 minutes. (6) The final shot shows a roasted sweet potato split open on a green plate, revealing steaming, bright yellow-orange flesh.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately with a female voice speaking in a high-pitched, excited tone. (2) A repetitive, rhythmic chant or jingle about 'roasted sweet potatoes' plays in the background behind the main speech. (3) Faint sound of rushing water is heard during the washing segment. (4) A mechanical 'click' and 'whirring' sound accompanies the oven dial being turned. (5) The music continues at a consistent volume until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Costco Wholesale logo at the top. (2) Hook text: '好市多最便宜 省錢!烤地瓜' (Costco's cheapest, save money! Roasted sweet potatoes). (3) Functional text: 'OK 175元' indicating the price. (4) Sequential instructions: '一次水洗好' (Wash them all at once), '包上一層薄薄的鋁箔紙' (Wrap in a thin layer of foil), '放入烤箱' (Put in oven), '低溫烤25分鐘' (Low temperature for 25 mins), '接下來190度60分鐘' (Next 190 degrees for 60 mins). (5) Closing text: '漂亮的烤地瓜 烤好囉' (Beautiful roasted sweet potatoes are ready).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Discovery -> Price Reveal -> Step-by-step Preparation -> Result

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 male passers-by visible in the background of the Costco warehouse
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young female with long dark hair, wearing a white lacy puff-sleeve top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First half shows a Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings and industrial shelving; second half shows a clean modern kitchen with a sink and a retro-style white oven.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright retail lighting followed by warm domestic kitchen lighting

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a lifestyle tip for budget-conscious consumers by highlighting a bargain at Costco and demonstrating a simple, step-by-step method to prepare roasted sweet potatoes at home as a healthy snack alternative to pre-cooked frozen options.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showing of the product, price, and branding within a retail environment followed by a positive outcome.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style with synchronized variety-show text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes 'save money' hooks to appeal to price-sensitive viewers while maintaining a high-quality visual aesthetic through clean kitchen settings.
